thesis.label: Investment Thesis
thesis.description: Stock-specific deep dives and bull vs bear debates

education.label: Education & Concepts
education.description: Value investing fundamentals, frameworks, and mental models

pages.title: ZETA Global 2025: The Cash Truth Test
pages.description: Bull vs Bear debate on ZETA Global. Cash flow analysis, dilution engine, balance sheet quality, and organic vs M&A growth.

pages.title: The Value Investor's Compass: Incremental ROIC
pages.description: WACC, ROIC, and Incremental ROIC explained with pizza and school analogies. Includes a real-world ZETA case study.

pages.title: ZETA Global: Forensic Investigation Report
pages.description: Deep bear case: consent farms, revenue round-tripping, FCF illusion via SBC, M&A smoke screen, and insider selling patterns.

pages.title: Reverse DCF: The Value Investor's Secret Weapon
pages.description: Stop guessing the future — read the market's mind. Reverse DCF framework explained with a real AMD case study showing implied growth expectations.

pages.title: AMD Investment Thesis 2026: Industrial Financial Noir
pages.description: Deep-dive Buffett-lens analysis of AMD: business quality moat, true FCF after SBC, Reverse DCF valuation, and capital allocation critique. HOLD at $160, buy zone $85–$113.

pages.title: AMD Strategic Research: Pre-Q1 2026 Deep Dive
pages.description: Comprehensive forensic analysis merging two research reports: market share, AI partnerships (Meta 6GW deal), gross margin path to 60%, dilution risks (320M warrants), and geopolitical TSMC exposure.

pages.title: Capital Allocation: Why M&A Deals Fail
pages.description: Interactive guide to M&A failures: agency problem, asymmetric information, premium pricing. Includes risk simulator and AMD case study (Xilinx, ZT Systems). Based on Saturday Stock School.
